scope.excluded_kinds: All non-corridor and non-route record kinds were out of scope. Corridor lookalikes with missing, different, or phase-specific limits were skipped.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same LIRR Port Jefferson Branch route identity. Both records use route_id Port Jefferson Branch, describe a rail/LIRR branch, and carry matching Port Jefferson Branch evidence; the target has the broader two-source LIRR branch cluster.
proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match, compatible rail/LIRR branch type, and no local/SBS/LTD/express/subway variant conflict. Alias absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json route aliases and visible identity prep artifacts through identity128 search; pair absent from do-not-merge.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same LIRR Montauk Branch route identity. Both records use route_id Montauk Branch, name the same branch, and have compatible LIRR branch/rail branch typing; the target has the broader source cluster.

alias.description: LIRR branch between Valley Stream and Rockville Centre where switch maintenance is planned.

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and compatible rail/LIRR branch type. Alias absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json route aliases and visible identity prep artifacts through identity128 search; pair absent from do-not-merge.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same Metro-North Harlem Line route identity. Both records use route_id Harlem Line, name the Harlem Line, identify commuter rail service, and use compatible Metro-North operator context; the target carries the larger multi-source Harlem Line cluster.

source_quotes: The Harlem Line rose 22.6% from 2022 with approximately 3.4 million more rides.
West of Hudson riders have a great alternative: The Hudson and Harlem Lines

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match, same commuter rail route type, and compatible Metro-North operator context. Alias absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json route aliases and visible identity prep artifacts through identity128 search; pair absent from do-not-merge.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same NYCT M subway route identity. Both records use route_id M, name the M Subway Line, and identify subway service; the target has the broader NYCT route cluster with M train evidence.

source_quotes: the E, F, M and R trains that run along that stretch

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and same subway route type/mode. Alias absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json route aliases and visible identity prep artifacts through identity128 search; pair absent from do-not-merge.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same NYCT R subway route identity. Both records use route_id R and identify the R subway line/train; the target is the broader NYCT R train cluster and the alias is a one-source R subway mention.

alias.source_quote: the E, F, M and R trains that run along that stretch

proposed_aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and compatible subway mode/type. Alias absent from data/identity-overrides/merges.json route aliases and visible identity prep artifacts through identity128 search; pair absent from do-not-merge.

guard_summary.applied_alias_exclusion: Checked data/identity-overrides/merges.json using the durable alias_id -> target_id shape under .aliases.<kind>; none of the proposed alias_ids are present.
guard_summary.prepared_alias_exclusion: Searched visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*-prep.json artifacts and explicit identity127/identity128 strings; none of the proposed alias_ids are already prepared. No identity127 or identity128 prep artifact was visible by filename/content search.
guard_summary.do_not_merge: Checked data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json for the proposed route pairs; no proposed pair appeared. The tempting M15 pair was excluded because do-not-merge explicitly blocks it.
guard_summary.route_guard: Every proposal has exact route_id equality and compatible route type/mode. No local/SBS/LTD/express/subway cross-variant bus pair was proposed.
guard_summary.corridor_guard: No corridor aliases were proposed because inspected corridor lookalikes had missing limits, different limits, phase-specific candidate records, or otherwise insufficient same-geography evidence for this strict batch.

command_evidence.purpose: List relevant artifacts and canonical files without running generated-output commands.
command_evidence.command: rg --files data packages docs wiki | rg '(^data/review_notes/|^data/identity-overrides/|^data/canonical/|LOG\.md$)'

command_evidence.purpose: Check whether identity127 or identity128 artifacts/content were visible.
Confirm applied merge override shape and collect applied alias IDs from alias_id -> target_id entries.
Collect visible prepared alias IDs from existing identity prep artifacts.
Find exact route_id duplicate groups with route type/service variant context.
command_evidence.command: jq -r 'select(.record_kind=="route") | [(.payload.route_id // ""), (.payload.route_type_normalized // .payload.route_type // ""), (.payload.service_variant // ""), .record_id, .display_name, (.source_ids|length)] | @tsv' data/canonical/routes.jsonl | awk -F '\t' '$1!=""{k=tolower($1); a[k]=a[k] ORS $0; c[k]++} END{for(k in c) if(c[k]>1) printf "## %s (%d)%s\n", k, c[k], a[k]}'

command_evidence.purpose: Inspect final candidate route records and evidence refs.
command_evidence.command: jq 'select(.record_id|IN("route_lirr-port-jefferson-branch-2023","route_port-jefferson-branch","route_lirr-montauk-branch-2023","route_montauk-branch-lirr","route_meeting-doc-106021-harlem-line","route_meeting-doc-124206-harlem-line","route_m-nyct-2025","route_meeting-doc-115256-m-subway","route_r-nyct-2025","route_meeting-doc-65171-r-subway")) | {record_id, display_name, payload, source_ids, evidence_refs: [.evidence_refs[]? | {evidence_id, page_number, source_quote, role}]}' data/canonical/routes.jsonl

command_evidence.purpose: Check final candidate IDs against applied/prepared/do-not-merge files.
command_evidence.result: No matches for the final candidate IDs.
